evals.prompt: Review this Governance page for approval readiness: https://confluenceent.cms.gov/spaces/SFIV/pages/1399171121
evals.expected_behavior: Read the Confluence page and labels, then return a narrative approval-readiness memo without writing to Confluence.

evals.prompt: Assess this Emmy governance doc draft and tell me what would block approval.
evals.expected_behavior: Apply the governance rubric, identify fatal flaws, and recommend concrete revisions.

evals.prompt: Grade the Emmy Change Monitoring Process governance document for whether an assessor could verify it.
evals.expected_behavior: Review auditability, requirement basis, current-state accuracy, and evidence path in a narrative memo.

evals.prompt: Create a governance document for this completed release communication process.
evals.expected_behavior: Use emmy-governance-doc-draft because the user wants to draft or create a document.

evals.prompt: Create a Jira ticket to update the CCB governance document.
evals.expected_behavior: Use the Emmy Jira ticketing workflow, not governance document review.
